Tooltip_BetterLockpickingContinuedBobbyP: Item for lockpicking. Used with a screwdriver. Skill must be learned from lockpicking magazine
Tooltip_BetterLockpickingContinued_Lockp: Magazine to learn lockpicking. You can lockpick doors and vehicles with a bobby pin
Tooltip_BetterLockpickingContinued_Alarm: Magazine to learn how to check for alarms. You can check a vehicle or house for alarms
